NAME

Detailed Description

  ascii_query::json::JsonObject::toString () const [inline],

Definition at line 211 of file

211                                            {
212     std::string result = "{";
213     for (size_t i = 0; i < keys_.size(); i++) {
214       if (i > 0)
215         result += ",";
216       result += "\"" + escape(keys_[i]) + "\":" + values_[i].toString();
217     }
218     result += "}";
219     return result;
